blocks.text: Capture gen AI's value by redesigning work, not by flattening expertise
Three moves to align AI deployment with the realities of the AI wall
01 Match — deploy gen AI where users have enough context to judge outputs; automate or redesign tasks where they don't
02 Redraw — blur boundaries between adjacent roles; resist forcing AI across large expertise gaps
03 Protect — keep junior hiring and apprenticeship; teach foundational judgment, not only execution
Foundation: enough domain knowledge to judge and improve AI outputs
